title: Delicate Korean-Style Baby Aubergine Dosirak
description: A delicate and flavorful Korean-inspired rice bowl dish featuring baby aubergine, perfect for a light meal.
instructions: Cook the sushi rice according to the package instructions.
Heat 1 tsp of sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the diced baby aubergine and cook for 3-4 minutes until tender.
In a small bowl, mix together gochujang, dried Korean chili flakes, and 1 tsp of sesame oil.
Add the gochujang mixture to the pan with the aubergine and stir to combine.
To assemble the dosirak, place a scoop of cooked sushi rice in the bottom of a bowl, followed by the aubergine mixture.
Garnish with sliced green onion, cucumber, and sesame seeds.
